plato:On.rdfs:label: On
plato:On.rdfs:comment: A predicate that can be used to specify that a certain block is stacked on top of another block.

plato:OnGround.rdfs:label: OnGround
plato:OnGround.rdfs:comment: A predicate that can be used to specify that a certain block is placed on ground.

plato:Holding.rdfs:label: Holding
plato:Holding.rdfs:comment: A predicate that can be used to specify that a certain block is currently being held.

plato:TopClear.rdfs:label: TopClear
plato:TopClear.rdfs:comment: A predicate that can be used to specify that a certain block has no other block placed on top of it.
